---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "fix(<scope>): brief description"
labels: "bug"
---

## Description

Clear, concise explanation of the issue and its impact on functionality.

## Evidence

- Source files affected (e.g., `src/client/h3_client.rs`)
- Relevant sections or function names
- How to reproduce (if applicable)

## Proposed Fix

High-level approach to resolving the issue:
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three (optional)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Issue is resolved
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No performance regression
